challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description:
Unutar niza library, kreiraj objekat sa sledećim svojstvima i vrednostima:

Property Value
title "Your Next Five Moves: Master the Art of Business Strategy"
author "Patrick Bet-David and Greg Dinkin"
about "A book on how to plan ahead"
pages 320

tests.text: You should have an object inside the library array.
The value of your title property should be "Your Next Five Moves: Master the Art of Business Strategy".
tests.testString: assert.propertyVal(library[0], "title", "Your Next Five Moves: Master the Art of Business Strategy");

tests.text: Your author property should have the value "Patrick Bet-David and Greg Dinkin".
Your about property should have the value "A book on how to plan ahead".
tests.testString: assert.propertyVal(library[0], "about", "A book on how to plan ahead");

tests.text: The value of your pages property should be a number.

challengeFiles.name: script
